full_suite.failure_notes: 30 failures in 46:16: 18 court fixture/state, 8 sandbox socket-bind, 1 event-head eval, 1 unrelated scaffold-category, and 2 unrelated storage-policy failures. This is a strict subset of the review's known 32-failure set; no failed test imports the exporter. Without a clean pre-lane baseline, they are not marked proven pre-existing.

honest_issues: Human review remains pending; precision, recall, source quarantine decisions and post-quarantine retention are unmeasured. P2 data.yaml is intentionally absent.
Only 182/210 original-frame audit samples were available after derivative deduplication.

The 1,308-entry balanced list ranges from 24 to 194 entries per family because the four-repeat cap prevents tiny families reaching the median target; racket-ai is downsampled from 8,067 to 194 entries per epoch.
One invalid Hemel box remains excluded: 47,043 valid boxes from 47,044 indexed boxes.
Residual uncovered collision classes include rotations, perspective warps, off-center crops, heavy occlusion/compositing, combined transforms, and learned/adversarial transforms.
The full suite and storage-policy audit are not green, although no new wide-suite failure was introduced.
Hardlinked images must remain read-only because in-place modification would also alter the source inode.
next: Complete and copy audit/review_template.csv outside the output directory, then rerun the exporter with --review-csv into a fresh output. Only a passing training_ready_gate will create P2 data.yaml.
